summary: Responsive dashboard verification across mobile (390x844), tablet (768x1024), and desktop (1440x900) breakpoints. Tested 9 dashboard pages (/app/overview, /app/agents, /app/conversations, /app/leads, /app/analytics, /app/integrations, /app/knowledge-base, /app/team, /app/settings) plus all mobile drawer interactions and logout. RESULT: All 27 page/breakpoint combinations pass — zero horizontal overflow (diff=0px), hamburger button shown only at <lg (390 & 768) and hidden at desktop, desktop sidebar shown only at lg+. Mobile drawer fully functional: opens via hamburger, closes via backdrop, close button, route change, and logout button. No JavaScript runtime errors. Analytics page renders cleanly.
critical_code_review_comments: Review request mentioned [data-testid='logout-btn'] but actual testid in code is 'dashboard-logout-btn' (mapped via DASH.logoutBtn). Functionality works correctly — only a documentation/spec mismatch in the review request, not a code bug.
Sidebar drawer uses aria-hidden on the outer wrapper (not on the <aside> drawer itself); drawer remains in DOM but pointer-events-none when closed — correct accessible pattern.
Mobile drawer width is w-72 max-w-[85%] which fits cleanly within 390px viewport (~85% = 331px). Good.
Hamburger uses lg:hidden which matches desktop sidebar's hidden lg:flex — correctly mirrored breakpoints (1024px).
TopBar Create Agent button collapses to icon-only on <sm via 'hidden sm:inline' wrap of label — works at 390px (icon only visible).
DashboardLayout closes mobileOpen on pathname change via useEffect — handles browser back/forward correctly.
Outer container uses overflow-hidden + min-w-0 on flex children to prevent horizontal overflow — solid implementation.
Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warnings persist on initial mount of Analytics/Overview (from iteration_1) — non-blocking, charts render correctly.
test_credentials: admin@oraone.ai / OraOne@2026 — verified working via /api/auth/login (returns access_token, stored as 'oraone_access_token' in localStorage).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile/tablet/desktop responsive layout for dashboard pages verified at 390/768/1440px. All 9 dashboard pages have 0px horizontal overflow at every breakpoint. Mobile drawer testids confirmed: dashboard-menu-btn (hamburger), mobile-sidebar (drawer), sidebar-backdrop, sidebar-close-btn. Logout testid is 'dashboard-logout-btn' (NOT 'logout-btn' as the request stated). Breakpoint: lg=1024px (hamburger hidden ≥1024, desktop sidebar shown ≥1024). Drawer width w-72 max-w-[85%]. Analytics page renders with no runtime errors.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no issues found. Mobile responsive implementation is complete and working as specified.
